full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50111

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50111.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cloud-init-23.4-7.0.3.el8_10.11.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
cloud-init-23.4-7.0.3.el8_10.11.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/cloud-init-23.4-7.0.3.el8_10.11.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[23.4-7.0.3.el8_10.11]
- Bypass network configuration determination if it already exists [Orabug: 38918000]
